title: dregea pubescens
intro: Dregea pubescens, also known as the 'cat's whisker' plant, is a species of flowering plant in the family Apocynaceae. It is traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects, which can help alleviate various health issues. The health benefits of Dregea pubescens include reducing fever, relieving pain, and treating respiratory problems such as coughs and bronchitis. The plant is often prepared as a tea, decoction, or tincture for its medicinal purposes, and is also used in traditional Chinese medicine.
